title: L_Ender's Cataclysm
description: Cataclysm is a mod that adds difficult dungeons, challenging boss-fights and powerful items.
body:
Cataclysm is a mod that adds difficult dungeons, challenging boss-fights and powerful items.

Defeat them in battle to prove yourself and earn powerful gear!



[![Cataclysm BE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4673f2bfe8a8078143181a917be943c6e3a551e8.png)](http://discord.gg/honeyfrost)

Cataclysm is finally coming to the Minecraft Bedrock on all Platforms as an Add-On in 2026!

Watch it’s Announcement Trailer Here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oSmwvFQNG0M



For more information about Cataclysm Bedrock Edition,

join Honeyfrost’s Discord at: http://discord.gg/honeyfrost

No Fabric

Tutorial(German):https://youtu.be/21k2s9t81us
